function.name: _company_role_update
function.description: Update an existing role in the company. Must specify the role ID and list the fields to be updated in updateFieldList. Only fields listed in updateFieldList will be modified.

updateFieldList.description: List of field names to be updated in this operation. Only fields listed here will be modified; other fields will remain unchanged.

key.description: Role unique identifier (must be unique within the company). Must use camelCase naming, only English letters and numbers, no underscores or special characters.

name.description: Role name (must be unique within the company). Used for display in the interface.

remark.description: Role description, explaining the responsibilities and usage scenarios.

permissionIds.description: Set of permission IDs assigned to this role.

rowNumber.description: Display order number. Lower numbers appear first.
